evals.prompt: I am building a client portal with login, dashboards, docs pages, and Vercel deployment. Should I use Vite or Next?
evals.expected_output: A Next.js recommendation with routing, auth/data, metadata/deployment implications and Vite as fallback only if constraints change.

evals.prompt: Our team already has a Vue component library and wants a content-heavy product site with some logged-in pages.
evals.expected_output: A Nuxt recommendation grounded in Vue-first team/design system and content workflows.

evals.prompt: We need a fast prototype for an interactive diagramming tool embedded in another app. SEO does not matter.
evals.expected_output: A React + Vite recommendation due to interactivity, embed/custom runtime, and low SSR/SEO need.
